_note: Railcard rules for TfL Oyster/contactless. Source: tfl.gov.uk/fares/find-fares/railcard-discounts

26-30.name: 26-30 Railcard
26-30.notes: 1/3 off off-peak only. During peak hours full adult fare is charged. No minimum fare. Does not apply to buses. Must be registered on physical Oyster card (not contactless).

16-17.name: 16-17 Saver
16-17.notes: 1/3 off at all times on TfL. Similar rules to 26-30.

two-together.name: Two Together Railcard
two-together.notes: 1/3 off OFF-PEAK only. Does NOT apply during peak Mon–Fri 06:30–09:29 and 16:00–18:59. Both cardholders must travel together.

annual-gold.name: Annual Gold Card / Season Ticket
annual-gold.notes: 1/3 off off-peak. Does NOT apply during peak AM Mon–Fri.

senior.name: Senior Railcard
senior.notes: 1/3 off off-peak only. Does not apply during peak. For over 60s.

network.name: Network Railcard
network.notes: 1/3 off off-peak. Mainly for National Rail travel in South East England. On TfL: only valid Mon–Fri after 10:00, all day weekends.

freedom-pass.name: Freedom Pass
freedom-pass.notes: Free travel for London residents over 60 or with eligible disabilities. Off-peak only on Tube (valid from 09:00 Mon–Fri, any time weekends). Buses are free at any time.

60plus.name: 60+ Oyster Card
60plus.notes: Free travel for London residents aged 60+. Valid from 09:00 Mon–Fri on Tube, anytime on buses.
